items.headline: Russia and Ukraine agree to a three-day ceasefire
items.body: Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a three-day ceasefire starting May 9. The temporary truce provides a brief window to halt hostilities and exchange 1,000 prisoners.

items.headline: South Africa's top court revives presidential impeachment inquiry
items.body: South Africa's Constitutional Court overturned a parliamentary vote that blocked an impeachment inquiry. This ruling forces lawmakers to reconsider proceedings against the president over a corruption scandal.

items.headline: Four men convicted in assassination of Haiti's president
items.body: A US federal jury convicted four men for their roles in the 2021 assassination. The verdict holds key plotters accountable, impacting Haiti's long search for political justice.

items.headline: United Nations proposes new global dashboard to measure progress beyond GDP
items.body: A UN expert group released a new framework for assessing country-level progress. This shifts how development is measured, influencing policy and investment decisions globally.

items.headline: Ted Turner, CNN founder and cable television pioneer, dies at 87
items.body: Turner died May 6 after revealing in 2018 he had Lewy body dementia. His creation of 24-hour news broadcasting reshaped how hundreds of millions globally consume information.

items.headline: Virginia Supreme Court strikes down Democratic congressional redistricting map
items.body: The court ruled May 8 that the legislature violated procedural requirements placing the constitutional amendment on ballot. The nullified map would have shifted Virginia's congressional delegation from 6-5 Democratic to 10-1.

items.headline: Canvas learning platform hacked during final exam period affecting 9,000 schools worldwide
items.body: Criminal group ShinyHunters breached the system May 7 forcing maintenance mode during exams. The platform serves over 30 million active users globally.

items.headline: Mount Dukono eruption kills three climbers in Indonesia
items.body: The volcano erupted May 8 killing two Singaporeans and one Indonesian among 20 climbers. Authorities had noted increased explosive magmatic activity since March.
